name: Parsnip

name: Green Bean
description: A spring trellis crop grown from Bean Starter that continues producing after maturity.
profitNotes: Regrows after first harvest; trellis placement can reduce farm accessibility if planned poorly.

name: Strawberry
description: A spring fruit crop grown from Strawberry Seeds and sold at the Egg Festival.
profitNotes: Strong spring regrowth crop, but first-year access starts at the Egg Festival unless seeds were saved.
beginnerNote: A spring fruit crop grown from Strawberry Seeds and sold at the Egg Festival.
